title: Generationenabschluss für Cutover und Systemablösung erzwingen
goal: Systemischer Befund: Neue Runtime- oder Produktgenerationen werden häufig erfolgreich aktiviert, während Vorgängerdienste, Konfigurationen, Quellen, Sessions, Worktrees, Fleet-Einträge und Katalogsemantik teilweise offen bleiben. Aufgabe: einen fail-closed Abschlussvertrag einführen, der Vorgänger je Fläche als entfernt, archiviert, Recovery oder weiterhin benötigt klassifiziert und erst dann terminalen Closeout erlaubt. Kein neues Statusregister; bestehende Quellwahrheiten und Receipts bleiben autoritativ.

acceptance.assertion: Task metadata preserves the originating live-register event id and source.
Any repository effect remains review-before-effect and does not follow from the live event alone.
Every predecessor surface is classified as removed, archived, recovery or still-required.
The contract reuses source receipts and does not create a second status authority.

metadata.verification_note: PR #708 introduced the opt-in, fail-closed generation transition and predecessor closeout contract. The contract validates exact predecessor coverage, dispositions, source evidence, canonical hash binding and non-authority boundaries without creating a second runtime or registry truth.

validated_acceptance.source-event-bound: PASS: live-register event 737, candidate id and source remain unchanged in metadata.
validated_acceptance.reviewed-before-effect: PASS: implementation was isolated, diff-reviewed, fully validated and merged through PR #708 after green CI.
validated_acceptance.predecessor-classification: PASS: terminal declared generation transitions require exact one-to-one classification as removed, archived, recovery or still-required, with disposition-specific evidence.
validated_acceptance.no-second-truth: PASS: the validator reads optional metadata in the existing task document and grants no source, effect or recovery authority.
